name: wegotworkspace/wegotworkspace
description: WordPress-style web installer and runtime for self-hosted SabreDAV (CalDAV, CardDAV, WebDAV files)

suggest.ext-imap: Required for /mail IMAP sync (folders, read, send uses SMTP separately)
suggest.ext-openssl: Used to encrypt per-user mail passwords on disk
suggest.ext-pdo_sqlite: Default database backend for the installer
